speaker: forshee
text: we have just learned that Dr. Szarfman is a co-author on a recently published paper based on COVID-19 vaccines and VAERS. We believe there are a number of issues with the paper and its findings, and we are discussing how to best respond.
context: Forshee notified Marks and Anderson of Szarfman's published Drug Safety paper and signaled internal pushback to it.
